rationale: The citing paper references Jap (2001) once in the literature review to support a general statement that league rules can be used to jointly manage and allocate rewards in alliance-like settings. The citation is used as broad conceptual background and is not carried into the paper's model specification, variables, estimation strategy, or core empirical interpretation. There is no clear evidence that the specific framework from Jap (2001) is directly built on or tested in this study.
